stories.headline: Muckamore Abbey Hospital: Parents question care of their daughter
stories.description: Laura, 41, was admitted to Muckamore Abbey Hospital when she was 16 and lived there for more than 17 years.

stories.headline: Norway's crown princess undergoes successful lung transplant, palace says
stories.description: Crown Princess Mette-Marit, who suffered from pulmonary fibrosis, will now spend several weeks recovering in hospital.

stories.headline: Taiwan accuses Kenya of deporting conference delegates on China’s behalf
stories.description: First African nation to host the global oceans conference defends deportations, saying it ‘recognises only one China’.

stories.headline: Israel takes control of Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque: What this means
stories.description: Palestinians controlled planning and construction in the entire West Bank city under the 1997 Hebron Agreement.

stories.headline: 'We travel 530 miles to Lowestoft so our son can have a haircut'
stories.description: How a very special hairdressing salon in Lowestoft is cutting it when it comes to neurodivergence.
